description: Cross-language consistency fixture for the Stop-hook divergence gate (issue #69, Decision 4/5). Each case configures a sequence of Stop-hook decisions (`hook_decisions`), a `max_stop_blocks` cap, and asserts the resulting per-run block-count behavior. `expected.blocks` is the number of Stop blocks the harness honored (each injects a reason and continues); `expected.terminated_by` is either `continue` (a hook allowed termination) or `cap` (max_stop_blocks reached). A `block` decision while under the cap consumes one block and continues; once `blocks == max_stop_blocks`, the next block is ignored and the loop terminates.
